default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce new web strategist Meaghan Winston to GrowthX team and discuss current SEO strategies, content production, and potential improvements for Abnormal.ai.](https://fathom.video/share/P_D4acwcuNoxT6oYZwy5DBvZQNyxp4cW?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX produces \~7-9 articles/week for Abnormal, including editorial and glossary content, with a focus on AI and cybersecurity topics](https://fathom.video/share/P_D4acwcuNoxT6oYZwy5DBvZQNyxp4cW?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
  - [Current reporting focuses on sessions and engagement; team eager to incorporate conversion metrics and demo form fills](https://fathom.video/share/P_D4acwcuNoxT6oYZwy5DBvZQNyxp4cW?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)
  - [Opportunities identified: improve site speed, add schema markup to FAQs, update blog template, and enhance mobile UX](https://fathom.video/share/P_D4acwcuNoxT6oYZwy5DBvZQNyxp4cW?tab=summary&timestamp=1465.0)
  - [Collaboration on keyword strategy and content ideas welcomed from Abnormal team](https://fathom.video/share/P_D4acwcuNoxT6oYZwy5DBvZQNyxp4cW?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)

## Topics

### Current Content Strategy and Production

  - [Publishing \~7-9 articles weekly, including editorial and glossary content](https://fathom.video/share/P_D4acwcuNoxT6oYZwy5DBvZQNyxp4cW?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
  - [222 editorial articles and 110 glossary pages published to date](https://fathom.video/share/P_D4acwcuNoxT6oYZwy5DBvZQNyxp4cW?tab=summary&timestamp=1286.0)
  - [Focus on AI and cybersecurity topics, with emphasis on behavioral AI and vertical-specific content](https://fathom.video/share/P_D4acwcuNoxT6oYZwy5DBvZQNyxp4cW?tab=summary&timestamp=1314.0)
  - [Content ideas sourced from keyword gap analysis, competition research, and internal suggestions](https://fathom.video/share/P_D4acwcuNoxT6oYZwy5DBvZQNyxp4cW?tab=summary&timestamp=1251.0)
  - [Refresh strategy in place for older content to maintain relevance and competitiveness](https://fathom.video/share/P_D4acwcuNoxT6oYZwy5DBvZQNyxp4cW?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

### SEO and Analytics

  - [Using Airtable for content management and Looker Studio for analytics reporting](https://fathom.video/share/P_D4acwcuNoxT6oYZwy5DBvZQNyxp4cW?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [Current metrics include sessions, engaged sessions, and LLM mentions](https://fathom.video/share/P_D4acwcuNoxT6oYZwy5DBvZQNyxp4cW?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
  - [Lack of conversion data (e.g., demo form fills) identified as an area for improvement](https://fathom.video/share/P_D4acwcuNoxT6oYZwy5DBvZQNyxp4cW?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)
  - [Google Search Console and Analytics data available, segmented by content type](https://fathom.video/share/P_D4acwcuNoxT6oYZwy5DBvZQNyxp4cW?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)

### AI Search Optimization

  - [Prioritizing AI search visibility through prompt feeding and keyword optimization](https://fathom.video/share/P_D4acwcuNoxT6oYZwy5DBvZQNyxp4cW?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
  - [Focusing on fresh content and regular updates to improve chances of AI citations](https://fathom.video/share/P_D4acwcuNoxT6oYZwy5DBvZQNyxp4cW?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Tracking LLM mentions using Scrunch tool with 100+ prompts](https://fathom.video/share/P_D4acwcuNoxT6oYZwy5DBvZQNyxp4cW?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)

### Content Performance and Conversion

  - [Team eager to incorporate conversion metrics and demo form fills into reporting](https://fathom.video/share/P_D4acwcuNoxT6oYZwy5DBvZQNyxp4cW?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)
  - [Opportunity identified to improve blog's role as a conversion engine](https://fathom.video/share/P_D4acwcuNoxT6oYZwy5DBvZQNyxp4cW?tab=summary&timestamp=1696.0)
  - [Suggestion to establish clear conversion goals for blog content](https://fathom.video/share/P_D4acwcuNoxT6oYZwy5DBvZQNyxp4cW?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)

### Website Technical Issues

  - [Slow loading times on desktop and mobile identified as a priority issue](https://fathom.video/share/P_D4acwcuNoxT6oYZwy5DBvZQNyxp4cW?tab=summary&timestamp=1540.0)
  - [404 errors being tracked and addressed through content refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/P_D4acwcuNoxT6oYZwy5DBvZQNyxp4cW?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)
  - [Need for schema markup on FAQ sections of glossary pages](https://fathom.video/share/P_D4acwcuNoxT6oYZwy5DBvZQNyxp4cW?tab=summary&timestamp=1465.0)
  - [Mobile UX improvements needed, particularly for glossary pages (above-the-fold content visibility)](https://fathom.video/share/P_D4acwcuNoxT6oYZwy5DBvZQNyxp4cW?tab=summary&timestamp=1486.0)

### Collaboration and Process
